label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 14

extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ Richard soloed from the break on the penultimate climb, held off ROGLIČ's group by 8 seconds despite gap collapsing on final descent.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ attacked when EVENEPOEL showed weakness, forcing Jumbo-Visma to set tempo earlier than optimal for stage victory hunting.
CARAPAZ detonated early break by bridging to SÁNCHEZ Luis León on penultimate climb, converting mountain helper role into stage ambition.
EVENEPOEL lost 1:52 to ROGLIČ despite limiting losses after crisis, revealing cracks under sustained climbing before queen stage.
MAS Enric and LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel bridged to ROGLIČ group for bonus seconds, showing GC opportunism when red jersey cracked.
PEDERSEN Mads hunting intermediate sprint points from breakaway despite green jersey secure, maximizing lead while in form.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: converted break helper role into stage win by attacking rival SÁNCHEZ and holding 8sec over chasing GC group
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: exploited EVENEPOEL weakness to gain 1:52, closing GC gap to 1:49 with bonus seconds before queen stage
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: cracked on penultimate climb losing 1:52, struggling visibly before recovering composure for damage limitation
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: alert enough to bridge to ROGLIČ attack for bonus seconds when EVENEPOEL faltered, gaining 4sec
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: bridged to lead group late for 6 bonus seconds, showing recovery form after earlier race struggles
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: neutral: followed ROGLIČ attack with RODRÍGUEZ but required bike change, showing domestique commitment for RODRÍGUEZ GC
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: strong finish ahead of MAS group suggests building form in third week
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: neutral: finished with ALMEIDA ahead of MAS group, riding into form as expected for climbing domestique
